overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist walking through a sunlit medieval Middle Eastern city with canals, palm trees, and sandstone architecture. The character navigates from a waterfront promenade through archways and bustling market streets populated with NPCs.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the canal path beside palm trees and sandstone buildings

entered.detail: greenish water canal running parallel to the walkway
tall date palms with dense fronds providing shade
two-story historic building with arched doorways and weathered stone walls
blue fabric awning stretched between buildings shading the walkway

segments.scene_description: The protagonist walks along a sunlit canal promenade lined with palm trees on the left and sandstone buildings on the right. The blue fabric canopy provides intermittent shade as the character moves forward through the sparse crowd.

events.description: passing through stone archway from open canal promenade into narrower covered street
emerging from shadowed passage into brighter area revealing blue dome mosque in distance

agents.ego_description: navigating through the stone archway and narrow passage between historic buildings

entered.detail: large stone archway marking the entrance to the covered passage
intricate wooden latticework balcony projecting from the upper floor
distant mosque with prominent blue dome visible between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a stone archway into a narrow, shaded alley with cobblestone ground and wooden mashrabiya balconies overhead. The lighting shifts as the protagonist emerges to reveal a distant blue-domed mosque, while the canal moves to the left side of the frame.

events.description: turning right away from the canal onto a tree-lined inland path

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront quay past docked boats before turning inland away from the water

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown robe walking along the canal edge

entered.detail: small wooden boats moored along the stone canal edge
raised stone wall lining the canal with steps leading to water

segments.scene_description: The protagonist walks along the open waterfront quay with wooden boats docked along the stone embankment. The blue dome remains visible in the distance. At 32 seconds, the character turns right away from the canal onto a path lined with leafy trees.

events.description: moving from waterfront into inland tree-lined residential street

agents.ego_description: walking along the shaded path passing guards in red robes and approaching market area

notable_agents.action: two guards in red robes standing guard by the building entrance

entered.detail: broad deciduous tree with dense green canopy providing shade
residential building with carved stone details and wooden doors
fortified structure with guards posted at entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving inland from the waterfront, the character walks along a tree-lined path with sandstone residences. Two guards in distinctive red robes stand near a fortified building on the right. The canal fades from view as the market stalls begin to appear ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy market street with vendors and stalls

events.description: entering bustling market area with vendors, carts, and dense crowds

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowded market street past vendors and shoppers

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside wooden cart loaded with goods
woman in black robes walking through the market crowd

entered.detail: wooden market stall displaying colorful textiles and fabrics
large wooden wheeled cart used for transporting goods
elaborately carved sandstone building with decorative window screens
fabric awnings and hanging cloths creating shade over the market

segments.scene_description: The protagonist enters a bustling market street dense with NPCs browsing goods. Wooden carts and market stalls line the path, with colorful fabrics hanging overhead. The ornate sandstone architecture continues along the right side as the character navigates through the crowd.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene canal promenade into the dense, bustling heart of a medieval market. It begins with the protagonist walking along a sunlit waterfront lined with palm trees and sandstone buildings, passing under blue fabric canopies that cast intermittent shade. As the character moves through a stone archway, the scene shifts into a narrow, shaded alley with wooden balconies before opening back up to a quay where wooden boats are docked and a blue-domed mosque looms in the distance. The camera then follows the protagonist as they turn away from the water and move inland along a tree-lined path past red-robed guards and fortified residences. Finally, the environment transforms into a crowded market street, where the open waterfront is replaced by wooden carts, colorful hanging fabrics, and a dense throng of NPCs.
